chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Criminal Misc. Application No.S-247 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 01.01.2026 Mr. Moinuddin Akhter Qureshi advocate for the applicant a/w applicant. Mr. Dhani Bakhsh Mari, A.P.G a/w Inspector Aftab Rind, SHO P.S Digri. = Alleged detenue Shanita (now Mst. Fatima) has appeared alongwith her husband Muhammad Gulzar and stated that after embracing Islam, she has contracted free will marriage with Muhammad Gulzar. Her statement duly recorded in the Court is re-produced as under: On 22-12-2025, after embracing Islam, I contracted free will marriage with Muhammad Gulzar. Such free will affidavit was executed on the same date i.e. 22- 12-2025. Due to said marriage, my father/ applicant Chatro lodged FIR No. 99/ 2025 at P.S Digri regarding my abduction against my husband and others; though I was not abducted by any person and I with my own free will contracted marriage with Muhammad Gulzar. I am passing happy life with my husband Muhammad Gulzar and wish to go with him, who is present in Court. Since alleged detenue, being sue juris lady, has contracted free will marriage with Muhammad Gulzar and categorically stated that she is passing happy life with her husband and wish to go with her husband, who is present in the Court; therefore, instant Criminal Miscellaneous application is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE “Saleem” 2
